options.name: --in
options.description:
Required. input path for assembly to rewrite. Use multiple
flags for multiple input paths

options.name: --out
options.description:
Required. output path for rewritten assembly. Use multiple
flags for multiple output paths

options.name: --resolvedir
options.description:
Additional assembly resolve directories. Use multiple
flags for multiple resolve directories

options.name: --keyfile
options.description:
Sign rewritten assembly with this key file. When merge
option is specified, the merged assembly will be signed.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge all rewritten assemblies into a
single assembly using the first output path as target
